description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The documents herein define processes for invoking (onboarding) new
Instances and offboarding existing ones. This process will be specified in a future iteration of the Spark Artifact.
summary: Add Solana Pioneer Chain Instance To Keel
description: Adds the Solana Instance Configuration Document to Keel's Pioneer Chain Primitive and specifies its associated parameters.
